content.text:
I searched the repository for Quarto (`*.qmd`) or slide files mentioning “ESG Preference,” “SUE/SYY,” or “empirical strategy,” including inside the `.Trash/my-project 19.06.43` subtree that contains the only `.qmd` I could locate:

- `/Users/my/.claude/worktrees/agent-a4279f9e/.Trash/my-project 19.06.43/guide/workflow-guide.qmd`

The content scan across `.Trash` and the rest of the tree did not reveal any references to ESG preference, SUE, SYY, or “empirical strategy,” so I couldn’t extract any structure, sections, or data points tied to those topics. If you know of specific files or directories I should target (e.g., under `output/` or `papers/`), let me know and I can refine the search accordingly.
